sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas WHERE fecha::date BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM ventas WHERE fecha::date BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'

logica: SUM(ventas.total) GROUP BY cliente ORDER BY DESC LIMIT 1
sql: SELECT c.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas v JOIN clientes c ON v.cliente_id=c.id {where} GROUP BY c.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 1

logica: SUM GROUP BY cliente ORDER BY DESC LIMIT 5
sql: SELECT c.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas v JOIN clientes c ON v.cliente_id=c.id {where} GROUP BY c.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COALESCE(p.nombre, v.producto) AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.cantidad),0)::int AS valor FROM ventas v LEFT JOIN productos p ON v.producto_id=p.id {where} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', fecha),'YYYY-MM') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM fecha)=EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT s.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas v JOIN sucursales s ON v.sucursal_id=s.id {where} GROUP BY s.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 20

pregunta: Ventas del año pasado vs este año
sql: SELECT EXTRACT(year FROM fecha)::int::text AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM fecha) IN (EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE), EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE)-1) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM facturas {where_alone}
SELECT 'Sin datos' AS nombre, 0::numeric AS valor WHERE FALSE
respuesta: 🧑‍💼 Ranking de vendedores no disponible (no hay columna vendedor_id en ventas).

sql: SELECT c.nombre, f.serie||'-'||f.numero AS doc, f.saldo::numeric AS valor, f.fecha FROM facturas f LEFT JOIN clientes c ON f.cliente_id=c.id WHERE f.estado IN ('pendiente','parcial') ORDER BY f.fecha ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0)::numeric AS valor FROM facturas WHERE estado IN ('pendiente','parcial')

logica: WHERE estado pendiente AND fecha < hoy-30
sql: SELECT c.nombre, f.serie||'-'||f.numero AS doc, f.saldo::numeric AS valor, (CURRENT_DATE - f.fecha) AS dias FROM facturas f LEFT JOIN clientes c ON f.cliente_id=c.id WHERE f.estado IN ('pendiente','parcial') AND f.fecha < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY f.fecha ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT serie||'-'||numero AS doc, fecha, total::numeric AS valor FROM facturas WHERE estado='anulada' ORDER BY fecha DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM facturas WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM facturas WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(impuesto),0)::numeric AS valor FROM facturas WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT c.nombre, (f.serie||'-'||f.numero) AS doc, f.total::numeric AS valor FROM facturas f LEFT JOIN clientes c ON f.cliente_id=c.id ORDER BY f.total DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM facturas WHERE estado='pagada' {and_fecha}
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM clientes
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM clientes WHERE creado_en::date BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'

logica: SUM(saldo) WHERE estado pendiente GROUP BY cliente
sql: SELECT c.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(f.saldo),0)::numeric AS valor FROM clientes c JOIN facturas f ON f.cliente_id=c.id WHERE f.estado IN ('pendiente','parcial') GROUP BY c.nombre HAVING SUM(f.saldo) > 0 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT c.nombre, MAX(v.fecha)::date AS ultima_compra FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN ventas v ON v.cliente_id=c.id GROUP BY c.nombre HAVING MAX(v.fecha) IS NULL OR MAX(v.fecha) < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days' ORDER BY ultima_compra NULLS FIRST LIMIT 25
SELECT COALESCE(ciudad,'(sin ciudad)') AS nombre, COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM clientes GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT nombre, ruc, telefono, correo, ciudad, saldo::numeric AS valor FROM clientes ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 50

pregunta: Saldo total a favor de clientes
sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0)::numeric AS valor FROM clientes
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM proveedores
SELECT nombre, ruc, telefono, correo, saldo::numeric AS valor FROM proveedores ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 50
SELECT p.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(c.total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM compras c JOIN proveedores p ON c.proveedor_id=p.id {where} GROUP BY p.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0)::numeric AS valor FROM proveedores
respuesta: 📤 Total por pagar a proveedores: S/ {valor}

sql: SELECT factura_id, monto::numeric AS valor, COUNT(*)::int AS veces FROM pagos GROUP BY factura_id, monto HAVING COUNT(*)>1 ORDER BY veces DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM compras WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT p.nombre, c.fecha, c.total::numeric AS valor FROM compras c JOIN proveedores p ON c.proveedor_id=p.id WHERE c.estado='pendiente' ORDER BY c.fecha ASC LIMIT 50

logica: SUM(cantidad) GROUP BY producto ORDER BY DESC
sql: SELECT p.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(cd.cantidad),0)::int AS valor FROM compras_detalle cd JOIN productos p ON cd.producto_id=p.id GROUP BY p.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM productos WHERE activo=TRUE
SELECT nombre, stock::int AS valor, stock_min::int AS minimo FROM productos WHERE activo=TRUE AND stock <= stock_min ORDER BY stock ASC LIMIT 50
respuesta: ⚠️ Productos con stock bajo / por reponer

sql: SELECT nombre, stock::int AS valor FROM productos WHERE stock<=0 AND activo=TRUE ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 50
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(stock*costo),0)::numeric AS valor FROM productos WHERE activo=TRUE
respuesta: 📦 Valor del inventario al costo: S/ {valor}

sql: SELECT p.nombre, m.tipo, m.cantidad::int AS valor, m.fecha FROM movimientos_inventario m JOIN productos p ON m.producto_id=p.id WHERE m.fecha::date BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}' ORDER BY m.fecha DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT p.nombre, MAX(v.fecha)::date AS ultima_venta FROM productos p LEFT JOIN ventas v ON v.producto_id=p.id WHERE p.activo=TRUE GROUP BY p.nombre HAVING MAX(v.fecha) IS NULL OR MAX(v.fecha) < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY ultima_venta NULLS FIRST LIMIT 25
SELECT nombre, precio::numeric AS valor FROM productos WHERE activo=TRUE ORDER BY precio DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT nombre, precio::numeric AS valor FROM productos WHERE activo=TRUE AND precio>0 ORDER BY precio ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(categoria,'(sin categoría)') AS nombre, COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM productos GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT nombre, ROUND(((precio-costo)/NULLIF(precio,0)*100)::numeric,2) AS valor FROM productos WHERE activo=TRUE AND precio>0 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT nombre, saldo::numeric AS valor, moneda FROM cuentas_bancarias ORDER BY saldo DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0)::numeric AS valor FROM cuentas_bancarias
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS valor FROM movimientos_tesoreria WHERE tipo='ingreso' AND fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS valor FROM movimientos_tesoreria WHERE tipo='egreso' AND fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT tipo AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS valor FROM movimientos_tesoreria WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}' GROUP BY tipo ORDER BY tipo
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS valor FROM pagos WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT COALESCE(metodo,'(sin método)') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS valor FROM pagos GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC
SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM ventas WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM compras WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}') AS valor

SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM ventas WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}')=0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((( (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM ventas WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM compras WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}') ) / (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM ventas WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}') * 100)::numeric,2) END AS valor

SELECT 'ventas_mes' AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas WHERE date_trunc('month',fecha)=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE) UNION ALL SELECT 'compras_mes', COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM compras WHERE date_trunc('month',fecha)=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE) UNION ALL SELECT 'por_cobrar', COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0) FROM facturas WHERE estado IN ('pendiente','parcial') UNION ALL SELECT 'clientes', COUNT(*)::numeric FROM clientes
SELECT cc.tipo AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(ad.debe-ad.haber),0)::numeric AS valor FROM asientos_detalle ad JOIN cuentas_contables cc ON ad.cuenta_id=cc.id GROUP BY cc.tipo ORDER BY cc.tipo

logica: SUM por tipo ingreso/gasto en rango
sql: SELECT cc.tipo AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(ad.haber-ad.debe),0)::numeric AS valor FROM asientos_detalle ad JOIN cuentas_contables cc ON ad.cuenta_id=cc.id JOIN asientos_contables a ON ad.asiento_id=a.id WHERE cc.tipo IN ('ingreso','gasto') AND a.fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}' GROUP BY cc.tipo ORDER BY cc.tipo
SELECT fecha, glosa FROM asientos_contables WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}' ORDER BY fecha DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT codigo, nombre, tipo FROM cuentas_contables ORDER BY codigo LIMIT 100
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM usuarios WHERE activo=TRUE
SELECT nombre, ruc, moneda FROM empresas ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 20
SELECT nombre, direccion FROM sucursales ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 50
SELECT fecha::date AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas WHERE fecha >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT to_char(fecha,'YYYY-"Q"Q') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM fecha)=EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('week',fecha),'IYYY-IW') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas WHERE fecha >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE - fecha <= 30 THEN '0-30' WHEN CURRENT_DATE - fecha <= 60 THEN '31-60' WHEN CURRENT_DATE - fecha <= 90 THEN '61-90' ELSE '>90' END AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0)::numeric AS valor FROM facturas WHERE estado IN ('pendiente','parcial') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT (COALESCE(SUM(total),0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fecha::date),0))::numeric AS valor FROM ventas WHERE fecha >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT c.nombre, COUNT(f.id)::int AS valor FROM facturas f JOIN clientes c ON f.cliente_id=c.id GROUP BY c.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(total)=0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((SUM(total-saldo)/NULLIF(SUM(total),0)*100)::numeric,2) END AS valor FROM facturas
SELECT estado AS nombre, COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM facturas GROUP BY estado ORDER BY valor DESC

logica: comparar SUM pagos vs SUM facturas
sql: SELECT 'facturado' AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM facturas WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}' UNION ALL SELECT 'cobrado', COALESCE(SUM(monto),0) FROM pagos WHERE fecha BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT COALESCE(p.nombre, v.producto) AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas v LEFT JOIN productos p ON v.producto_id=p.id {where} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT fecha::text AS nombre, total::numeric AS valor FROM ventas ORDER BY fecha DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT fecha::text AS nombre, total::numeric AS valor FROM compras ORDER BY fecha DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT (serie||'-'||numero) AS nombre, total::numeric AS valor FROM facturas ORDER BY fecha DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT fecha::text AS nombre, monto::numeric AS valor FROM pagos ORDER BY fecha DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(banco,'(sin banco)') AS nombre, COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM cuentas_bancarias GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC
SELECT cuenta_id, fecha, monto::numeric AS valor, concepto AS nombre FROM movimientos_tesoreria WHERE tipo='transferencia' ORDER BY fecha DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT COALESCE(concepto,'(sin concepto)') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS valor FROM movimientos_tesoreria WHERE tipo='egreso' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 25

pregunta: Crecimiento de ventas mes a mes
logica: Crecimiento de ventas mes a mes
sql: WITH m AS (SELECT date_trunc('month',fecha) AS mes, SUM(total) AS v FROM ventas WHERE fecha >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY 1) SELECT to_char(mes,'YYYY-MM') AS nombre, ROUND(((v - LAG(v) OVER (ORDER BY mes)) / NULLIF(LAG(v) OVER (ORDER BY mes),0) * 100)::numeric,2) AS valor FROM m ORDER BY mes

WITH t AS (SELECT c.nombre, SUM(v.total) AS s FROM ventas v JOIN clientes c ON v.cliente_id=c.id GROUP BY c.nombre), tot AS (SELECT SUM(s) AS x FROM t) SELECT t.nombre, ROUND((s/NULLIF((SELECT x FROM tot),0)*100)::numeric,2) AS valor FROM t ORDER BY s DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT ROUND(AVG((CURRENT_DATE - fecha))::numeric,1) AS valor FROM facturas WHERE estado IN ('pendiente','parcial')
SELECT nombre, COALESCE(telefono,'-') AS telefono, COALESCE(correo,'-') AS correo FROM clientes WHERE (telefono IS NULL OR telefono='') AND (correo IS NULL OR correo='') ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 50

SELECT CASE WHEN activo THEN 'activos' ELSE 'inactivos' END AS nombre, COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM productos GROUP BY activo
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(stock),0)::int AS valor FROM productos

SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month',fecha),'YYYY-MM') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM compras WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM fecha)=EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT nombre, ROUND(((precio-costo))::numeric,2) AS valor FROM productos WHERE precio>0 ORDER BY (precio-costo) DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM ventas)=0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM compras) / NULLIF((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM ventas),0) * 100)::numeric,2) END AS valor
SELECT COALESCE(c.ciudad,'(sin ciudad)') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas v JOIN clientes c ON v.cliente_id=c.id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT c.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(f.saldo),0)::numeric AS valor FROM clientes c JOIN facturas f ON f.cliente_id=c.id WHERE f.estado IN ('pendiente','parcial') GROUP BY c.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT nombre, saldo::numeric AS valor FROM proveedores ORDER BY saldo DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT fecha::text AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS valor FROM pagos WHERE date_trunc('month',fecha)=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY fecha ORDER BY fecha
SELECT COALESCE(p.categoria,'(sin)') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas v JOIN productos p ON v.producto_id=p.id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT ROUND((SUM(v.total)/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT v.cliente_id),0))::numeric,2) AS valor FROM ventas v
SELECT EXTRACT(hour FROM fecha)::int::text AS nombre, COUNT(*)::int AS valor FROM ventas WHERE fecha >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT fecha::date::text AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas GROUP BY fecha::date ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month',fecha),'YYYY-MM') AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT EXTRACT(year FROM fecha)::int::text AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS valor FROM ventas GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 1

logica: Productos por encima de stock máximo (>1000 uds)

SELECT 'Ventas mes' AS nombre, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM ventas WHERE date_trunc('month',fecha)=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE))::numeric AS valor UNION ALL SELECT 'Compras mes', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM compras WHERE date_trunc('month',fecha)=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)) UNION ALL SELECT 'Utilidad mes', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM ventas WHERE date_trunc('month',fecha)=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)) - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM compras WHERE date_trunc('month',fecha)=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)) UNION ALL SELECT 'Por cobrar', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0) FROM facturas WHERE estado IN ('pendiente','parcial')) UNION ALL SELECT 'Por pagar', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0) FROM proveedores) UNION ALL SELECT 'Bancos', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0) FROM cuentas_bancarias)
SELECT s.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(m.cantidad),0)::int AS valor FROM movimientos_inventario m JOIN sucursales s ON m.sucursal_id=s.id GROUP BY s.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cantidad),0)::int AS valor FROM movimientos_inventario WHERE tipo='entrada' AND fecha::date BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cantidad),0)::int AS valor FROM movimientos_inventario WHERE tipo='salida' AND fecha::date BETWEEN '{from}' AND '{to}'
SELECT p.nombre, m.cantidad::int AS valor, m.motivo, m.fecha FROM movimientos_inventario m JOIN productos p ON m.producto_id=p.id WHERE m.tipo='ajuste' ORDER BY m.fecha DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT COALESCE(categoria,'(sin)') AS nombre, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN precio>0 THEN (precio-costo)/precio*100 ELSE 0 END)::numeric,2) AS valor FROM productos GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT c.nombre, COUNT(f.id)::int AS valor FROM clientes c JOIN facturas f ON f.cliente_id=c.id WHERE f.estado='pagada' GROUP BY c.nombre ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT (serie||'-'||numero) AS doc, saldo::numeric AS valor FROM facturas WHERE estado='parcial' ORDER BY fecha DESC LIMIT 50

pregunta: Ranking de productos por unidades vendidas año
logica: Ranking de productos por unidades vendidas año
sql: SELECT COALESCE(p.nombre, v.producto) AS nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.cantidad),0)::int AS valor FROM ventas v LEFT JOIN productos p ON v.producto_id=p.id WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM v.fecha)=EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY valor DESC LIMIT 10
